error_message_not_found: The package you selected could not be found.
warning_body_login_required: You'll be prompted to log in before payment.
confirm_login_message: Please log in to continue with checkout. Redirect to login page?
toast_already_subscribed: You already have an active package for this plan.
error_package_not_synced: This package is not available for payment yet. Please contact support.
low_bandwidth_note: Low-bandwidth mode detected. We are using lighter network behavior to reduce failures.
recovery_message: Order {orderId} is still pending or failed. You can safely reopen checkout for this order.
recovery_retry_failed: We couldn't resume that payment. Start a fresh checkout below.
exchange_note_regional: Price shown in {displayCurrency} for {region}. Payment processed in EGP.
geo_loading: Detecting your region to show the right price...
geo_failed_note: We could not detect your region. Showing Egypt pricing.
confirm_currency_note: Prices on the site are shown in {currency}, but Paymob processes payments in EGP. The amount above is what your card will be charged.
confirm_mismatch_title: Price does not match what you saw
confirm_mismatch_body: The website showed {expected}, but the payment system will charge {actual}. This usually means our pricing catalog is ahead of the backend. You can continue, or cancel and contact support.
confirm_mismatch_acknowledge: I understand I will be charged {amount}
price_mismatch_message: The amount on screen was {shown}, but the current charge is {actual}. Please review before continuing.
